_comment: Global Tool Access Policy for the ContosoPay SRE Agent. PUT this at the agent's GLOBAL settings scope - only the global scope may DENY tools, so this can't be overridden by a custom agent, a response plan, or a chat prompt. It removes the agent's ability to mutate Azure directly, forcing GitOps (PR) remediation. See https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/sre-agent/tool-access-policies
